calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-03-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ilan Zamir and Or Dobrin representing Appellant/Defendant Amber Flooring Co. present.
Respondant/Plaintiff Douglas Gower dba Mesa Construction also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Respondant/Plaintiff Douglas Gower testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exh. 1 - 1/2/13 Tree Lover's Letter
Exh. 2 - 1/3/13 Letter from Client
Exh. 3 - (6) Letters between Mesa & Amber dated 12/1/11, 12/5/11, 12/10/11, 12/29/11, 1/20/12 and 2/9/12
Exh. 4 - Tree Lover's Invoice
Exh. 5 - Contract
Exh. 6 - Copies of Cancelled Checks
Exh. 7 - 10/14/11 Email correspondence

Ilan Zamir testifies on behalf of Appellant/Defendant Amber Flooring Co. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exh. A - 9/28/11 Secondary Contract
Exh. B - 8/4/11 Original Contract
Exh. C - 9/28/11 Email Correspondence
Exh. D - 9/12/11 Amber Flooring Schedule

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. All exhibits are retained.

VJ Wallace P. Douglass, Clerk: Vicki Mack, Not Reported (Dept. 303)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2013 Set For Trial On Jan-03-13 At 09:45 A.M. In Dept 303

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-03-2013 Continued To Jan-03-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-23-2012 Judgment Entered
